candidates.primary_principle: Co-create with humans you serve through empathy-first, participatory methods rather than designing AT them.
candidates.citation_form: IDEO.org. The Field Guide to Human-Centered Design. designkit.org.
candidates.extracted_excerpt: Human-centered design is a practical, repeatable approach to arriving at innovative solutions. Think of these Methods as a step-by-step guide to unleashing your creativity, putting the people you serve at the center of your design process to come up with new answers to difficult problems.
